info.title: Bessel API
info.description: Hello! This is the Bessel API.

parameters.name: status

schema.description: Filter by status. Repeat to filter by multiple.
schema.title: Status

parameters.description: Filter by status. Repeat to filter by multiple.

parameters.name: completed_after

schema.description: Filter tasks completed after this Unix timestamp (inclusive).
schema.title: Completed After

parameters.description: Filter tasks completed after this Unix timestamp (inclusive).

parameters.name: completed_before

schema.description: Filter tasks completed before this Unix timestamp (exclusive).
schema.title: Completed Before

parameters.description: Filter tasks completed before this Unix timestamp (exclusive).

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Size of a page, defaults to 10. Maximum is 100.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Size of a page, defaults to 10. Maximum is 100.

parameters.name: sorting

schema.description: Sorting criterion. Several criteria can be used simultaneously and will be applied in order. Add a minus sign `-` before the criteria name to sort by descending order.
schema.title: Sorting

parameters.description: Sorting criterion. Several criteria can be used simultaneously and will be applied in order. Add a minus sign `-` before the criteria name to sort by descending order.

schema.title: Response List Areas V1 Tasks Areas Get

parameters.name: created_after

schema.description: Filter readings created after this Unix timestamp (inclusive).
schema.title: Created After

parameters.description: Filter readings created after this Unix timestamp (inclusive).

parameters.name: created_before

schema.description: Filter readings created before this Unix timestamp (exclusive).
schema.title: Created Before

parameters.description: Filter readings created before this Unix timestamp (exclusive).

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Size of a page, defaults to 10. Maximum is 100.
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Size of a page, defaults to 10. Maximum is 100.

parameters.name: sorting

schema.description: Sorting criterion. Several criteria can be used simultaneously and will be applied in order. Add a minus sign `-` before the criteria name to sort by descending order.

parameters.description: Sorting criterion. Several criteria can be used simultaneously and will be applied in order. Add a minus sign `-` before the criteria name to sort by descending order.

balancing_cells.title: Balancing Cells
balancing_cells.description: 1-based numbers of the cells currently being balanced.

modified_at.title: Modified At
modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp of the object.

device_name.title: Device Name
device_name.description: Bluetooth name of the BMS device.

device_address.title: Device Address
device_address.description: Bluetooth address of the BMS device.

device_model.title: Device Model
device_model.description: BMS model string reported by the device.

protocol.title: Protocol
protocol.description: Protocol used to read the BMS.

current_a.title: Current A
current_a.description: Pack current in amperes; positive when charging, negative when discharging.

rated_capacity_ah.title: Rated Capacity Ah
rated_capacity_ah.description: Rated capacity in ampere-hours, from the BMS settings.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Pack mode: idle, charging or discharging.

cell_count.title: Cell Count
cell_count.description: Number of cells in the pack.

cell_voltage_delta_v.title: Cell Voltage Delta V
cell_voltage_delta_v.description: Difference between highest and lowest cell voltage in volts.

charging_mosfet.title: Charging Mosfet
charging_mosfet.description: Whether the charging MOSFET is enabled.

discharging_mosfet.title: Discharging Mosfet
discharging_mosfet.description: Whether the discharging MOSFET is enabled.

has_alarms.title: Has Alarms
has_alarms.description: Whether any alarm register is set.

cell_voltages.title: Cell Voltages
cell_voltages.description: Per-cell voltages in volts, ordered by cell number.

temperatures.title: Temperatures
temperatures.description: Per-sensor temperatures in °C, ordered by sensor number.

balancing.description: Balancing details, if reported by the BMS.

alarms.title: Alarms
alarms.description: Raw alarm registers as hex strings, or null when no alarms are set.

alarm_messages.title: Alarm Messages
alarm_messages.description: Human-readable alarm/warning messages decoded from the alarm registers.

soc_percent.title: Soc Percent
soc_percent.description: Average state of charge in this bucket, or the last known value carried forward when the bucket has no readings.

has_data.title: Has Data
has_data.description: Whether a reading actually fell in this bucket.

buckets.title: Buckets
buckets.description: The most recent 30 buckets, oldest first.

modified_at.title: Modified At
modified_at.description: Last modification timestamp of the object.

position.title: Position
position.description: Position for ordering within a status column.

rrule_day_of_week.title: Rrule Day Of Week
rrule_day_of_week.description: Day of week for weekly recurrence (0=Mon, 6=Sun).

rrule_day_of_month.title: Rrule Day Of Month
rrule_day_of_month.description: Day of month for monthly recurrence (1-31).

parent_task_id.title: Parent Task Id
parent_task_id.description: Parent task ID for recurring chain.
